manifest_rows.rationale: Digital-security semiconductor leader intended to add mid-basis carry rows rather than only the currently saturated max-basis theme evidence.
Packaging and foundry-adjacent semiconductor name intended to create lower or mixed basis-spread carry rows inside a liquid technology context.
Power-battery platform name intended to probe carry rows that can extend beyond the current shared +1 day carry shape.
Solar-chain leader intended to add a second path for zero-day or multi-day carry-duration variation in a different cyclical growth regime.
Telecom backbone name intended to stress cases where challenger and incumbent can no longer share the same exit date under slower trend decay.
Travel-consumption leader intended to add exit-alignment breaks in a consumer regime that is structurally unlike the current theme_q4 island.
Auto-manufacturing leader intended to test whether carry-like negative-cycle basis can reappear outside the current theme_q4 semiconductor-heavy evidence cluster.
Global metals and resources anchor intended to probe carry reuse in a commodity-heavy context rather than a concentrated theme-growth context.

interpretation: The next refresh manifest should solve carry row-diversity gaps, not generic sample-size gaps.
A valid seed must add only new symbols versus the combined v1/v2 reference base while covering all four diversity targets.
This gate should pass before any market_research_v3 factor-diversity bootstrap is attempted.
